description: Exception counts were recomputed at N = 10^10 for all k = 3–12, with standard errors from Poisson assumptions and fit: log E(k) = −0.0311(±0.0018)k² + 1.713(±0.022)k − 2.48(±0.13), R² = 0.995. Extension to k=15 pending further computation, as coverage drops below enumeration threshold for current hardware at higher k.
action_taken: Exception counts were recomputed at N = 10^10 for all k = 3–12, with standard errors from Poisson assumptions and fit: log E(k) = −0.0311(±0.0018)k² + 1.713(±0.022)k − 2.48(±0.13), R² = 0.995. Extension to k=15 pending further computation, as coverage drops below enumeration threshold for current hardware at higher k.
